title: Higher education staff statistics UK: 2023 to 2024
body: "The Higher Education Statistics Agency (HESA) produce these statistics on staff employed at HE providers in the UK.  Information is available on:   academic and non-academic staff contract level and occupation nationality equality groups   Earlier higher education staff statistics bulletins are available on the HESA website.  "

taxons.title: Further and higher education, skills and vocational training
